Name: DAMAGE_ADJUST_PARAM
Description: Controls global damage adjustment multipliers for players and enemies, including difficulty scaling, co-op/invasion modifiers, NG+ cycle scaling, attribute damage adjustments, durability modifiers, and covenant effects.

Fields.Name: Player Fall Attack Weight Adjustment % (Light)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied to player fall attacks while in a light weight state.

Fields.Name: Player Fall Attack Weight Adjustment % (Medium)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied to player fall attacks while in a medium weight state.

Fields.Name: Player Fall Attack Weight Adjustment % (Heavy)
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied to player fall attacks while in a heavy weight state.

Fields.Name: Player Stamina Damage Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Adjusts the amount of stamina damage dealt by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Special Movement Stamina Damage Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Adjusts stamina damage dealt during special movement attacks.

Fields.Name: Player Insufficient Stat Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied when using equipment without meeting stat requirements.

Fields.Name: Player Damage Variance Adjustment % (Minimum)
Fields.Description: Minimum random damage variance multiplier for player attacks.

Fields.Name: Player Damage Variance Adjustment % (Maximum)
Fields.Description: Maximum random damage variance multiplier for player attacks.

Fields.Name: Player Difficulty Adjustment % (Very Easy)
Fields.Description: Player damage adjustment multiplier used on Very Easy difficulty.

Fields.Name: Player Difficulty Adjustment % (Easy)
Fields.Description: Player damage adjustment multiplier used on Easy difficulty.

Fields.Name: Player Difficulty Adjustment % (Normal)
Fields.Description: Player damage adjustment multiplier used on Normal difficulty.

Fields.Name: Player Difficulty Adjustment % (Hard)
Fields.Description: Player damage adjustment multiplier used on Hard difficulty.

Fields.Name: Player Difficulty Adjustment % (Very Hard)
Fields.Description: Player damage adjustment multiplier used on Very Hard difficulty.

Fields.Name: Player Difficulty Adjustment % (Hell)
Fields.Description: Player damage adjustment multiplier used on Hell difficulty.

Fields.Name: Player Durability Damage % (Weapon)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss applied to equipped weapons.

Fields.Name: Player Durability Damage % (Head Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss applied to head armor.

Fields.Name: Player Durability Damage % (Body Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss applied to body armor.

Fields.Name: Player Durability Damage % (Arm Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss applied to arm armor.

Fields.Name: Player Durability Damage % (Leg Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss applied to leg armor.

Fields.Name: Player Durability Damage % (Ring)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss applied to rings.

Fields.Name: Player Guard Durability Damage % (Weapon)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss to weapons while guarding.

Fields.Name: Player Guard Durability Damage % (Head Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss to head armor while guarding.

Fields.Name: Player Guard Durability Damage % (Body Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss to body armor while guarding.

Fields.Name: Player Guard Durability Damage % (Arm Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss to arm armor while guarding.

Fields.Name: Player Guard Durability Damage % (Leg Armor)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss to leg armor while guarding.

Fields.Name: Player Guard Durability Damage % (Ring)
Fields.Description: Adjusts durability loss to rings while guarding.

Fields.Name: Player Co-op Adjustment % 1
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used for co-op scaling slot 1.

Fields.Name: Player Co-op Adjustment % 2
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used for co-op scaling slot 2.

Fields.Name: Player Co-op Adjustment % 3
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used for co-op scaling slot 3.

Fields.Name: Player Co-op Adjustment % 4
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used for co-op scaling slot 4.

Fields.Name: Player Co-op Adjustment % 5
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used for co-op scaling slot 5.

Fields.Name: Player Co-op Adjustment % 6
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used for co-op scaling slot 6.

Fields.Name: Player Invasion Adjustment % 1
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used during hostile/invasion multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Player Invasion Adjustment % 2
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used during hostile/invasion multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Player Invasion Adjustment % 3
Fields.Description: Player adjustment multiplier used during hostile/invasion multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 1
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 1.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 2
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 2.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 3
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 3.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 4
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 4.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 5
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 5.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 6
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 6.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 7
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 7.

Fields.Name: Player NG Cycle Adjustment % 8
Fields.Description: Player scaling multiplier for New Game cycle 8.

Fields.Name: Enemy Damage Variance Adjustment % (Minimum)
Fields.Description: Minimum random damage variance multiplier for enemy attacks.

Fields.Name: Enemy Damage Variance Adjustment % (Maximum)
Fields.Description: Maximum random damage variance multiplier for enemy attacks.

Fields.Name: Enemy Difficulty Adjustment % (Very Easy)
Fields.Description: Enemy damage adjustment multiplier used on Very Easy difficulty.

Fields.Name: Enemy Difficulty Adjustment % (Easy)
Fields.Description: Enemy damage adjustment multiplier used on Easy difficulty.

Fields.Name: Enemy Difficulty Adjustment % (Normal)
Fields.Description: Enemy damage adjustment multiplier used on Normal difficulty.

Fields.Name: Enemy Difficulty Adjustment % (Hard)
Fields.Description: Enemy damage adjustment multiplier used on Hard difficulty.

Fields.Name: Enemy Difficulty Adjustment % (Very Hard)
Fields.Description: Enemy damage adjustment multiplier used on Very Hard difficulty.

Fields.Name: Enemy Difficulty Adjustment % (Hell)
Fields.Description: Enemy damage adjustment multiplier used on Hell difficulty.

Fields.Name: Enemy Co-op Play Adjustment % 1
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during cooperative multiplayer. Likely used for the first co-op player count tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Co-op Play Adjustment % 2
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during cooperative multiplayer for the second player count or scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Co-op Play Adjustment % 3
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during cooperative multiplayer for the third player count or scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Co-op Play Adjustment % 4
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during cooperative multiplayer for the fourth player count or scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Co-op Play Adjustment % 5
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during cooperative multiplayer for the fifth player count or scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Co-op Play Adjustment % 6
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during cooperative multiplayer for the sixth player count or scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Invasion Adjustment % 1
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during hostile multiplayer or invasion scenarios. Likely used for the first invasion scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Invasion Adjustment % 2
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during hostile multiplayer or invasion scenarios for the second scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy Invasion Adjustment % 3
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during hostile multiplayer or invasion scenarios for the third scaling tier.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 1
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the first New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 2
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the second New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 3
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the third New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 4
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the fourth New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 5
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the fifth New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 6
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the sixth New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 7
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the seventh New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Enemy New Game Cycle Adjustment % 8
Fields.Description: Enemy scaling multiplier applied during the eighth New Game Plus cycle.

Fields.Name: Network Test Finale Event Attack Power %
Fields.Description: Attack power multiplier used during the network test finale event.

Fields.Name: Physical Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global damage adjustment multiplier for physical-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Magic Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global damage adjustment multiplier for magic-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Lightning Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global damage adjustment multiplier for lightning-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Fire Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global damage adjustment multiplier for fire-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Dark Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global damage adjustment multiplier for dark-element attacks.

Fields.Name: Poison Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for poison buildup or damage.

Fields.Name: Bleed Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for bleed buildup or damage.

Fields.Name: Weapon Break Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for weapon durability damage effects.

Fields.Name: Curse Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for curse effects.

Fields.Name: Burn Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for burning effects.

Fields.Name: Deadly Poison Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for deadly poison effects.

Fields.Name: Petrification Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Global adjustment multiplier for petrification effects.

Fields.Name: Covenant of Champions Damage Dealt %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to outgoing damage while the Covenant of Champions is active.

Fields.Name: Covenant of Champions Damage Taken %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to incoming damage while the Covenant of Champions is active.

Fields.Name: Physical Attribute Adjustment Divisor (First Playthrough)
Fields.Description: Divisor applied to physical damage or attribute scaling during the first playthrough. Higher values reduce the resulting adjusted value.

Fields.Name: Physical Attribute Adjustment % (NG+ Cycles)
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to physical damage or attribute scaling during New Game Plus and subsequent cycles.

Fields.Name: Physical Attribute Adjustment Divisor (NG+ Cycles)
Fields.Description: Divisor applied to physical damage or attribute scaling during New Game Plus and subsequent cycles.

Fields.Name: Player Physical Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the player's physical damage or physical attribute scaling.

Fields.Name: Player Physical Attribute Adjustment Divisor
Fields.Description: Divisor affecting the player's physical damage or physical attribute scaling.

Fields.Name: Player Magic Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the player's magic damage or magic-related attribute scaling.

Fields.Name: Player Lightning Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the player's lightning damage or lightning-related attribute scaling.

Fields.Name: Player Fire Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the player's fire damage or fire-related attribute scaling.

Fields.Name: Player Dark Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the player's dark damage or dark-related attribute scaling.

Fields.Name: Player Poison Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the buildup or effectiveness of poison status effects applied by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Bleed Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the buildup or effectiveness of bleed status effects applied by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Weapon Durability Damage Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the amount of durability damage or weapon break buildup caused by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Curse Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the buildup or effectiveness of curse status effects applied by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Burning Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the buildup or effectiveness of burning status effects applied by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Toxic Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the buildup or effectiveness of toxic/deadly poison status effects applied by the player.

Fields.Name: Player Petrification Attribute Adjustment %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the buildup or effectiveness of petrification status effects applied by the player.
